ucs.title: [LLM] Scattered Spider / Octo Tempest Entra ID federated domain trust backdoor (AADInternals-style)
ucs.description: Hunts the addition or modification of a federated identity provider / custom domain in Entra ID — Scattered Spider (UNC3944 / Octo Tempest / 0ktapus) plants a rogue federation realm so it can mint SAML tokens and authenticate as any user without MFA. Microsoft DART and Mandiant attributed this tradecraft to this crew during MGM, Caesars, Clorox and the 2023-2024 SaaS intrusions; it follows a help-desk vishing → Global Admin role grab.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Change.user) as actor values(Change.src) as src_ip values(Change.object) as target_domain values(Change.command) as cmd from datamodel=Change where (Change.action=modified OR Change.action=created) AND Change.object_category IN ("AAD_Domain","directory","domain") AND (Change.command="Set federation settings on domain." OR Change.command="Set domain authentication." OR Change.command="Add verified domain." OR Change.command="Add unverified domain." OR Change.command="Add partner to company.") by Change.user Change.object Change.command host
| `drop_dm_object_name("Change")`
| eval is_offhours=if(strftime(firstTime,"%H") < 7 OR strftime(firstTime,"%H") > 19,1,0)
| join type=left user [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count as priv_signins from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=success Authentication.app="Azure Active Directory" by Authentication.user
    | rename Authentication.user as user]
| where (is_offhours=1 OR isnull(priv_signins) OR priv_signins<5)
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// Scattered Spider: rogue federated domain / IdP added to Entra tenant.
// Source: AAD audit logs surfaced into Defender XDR via CloudAppEvents.
let _known_admins = dynamic([]); // populate with break-glass + identity-team UPNs
CloudAppEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where Application in~ ("Microsoft Azure Active Directory","Office 365")
| where ActionType has_any (
    "Set federation settings on domain",
    "Set domain authentication",
    "Add verified domain",
    "Add unverified domain",
    "Add partner to company"
  )
| extend Raw = parse_json(tostring(RawEventData))
| extend TargetDomain = tostring(Raw.ObjectId)
| extend Issuer       = tostring(parse_json(tostring(Raw.ModifiedProperties))[0].NewValue)
| extend Actor        = coalesce(AccountDisplayName, tostring(Raw.UserId))
| where Actor !in~ (_known_admins)
| project Timestamp, Actor, AccountObjectId, IPAddress, CountryCode, IsAnonymousProxy,
          UserAgent, ActionType, TargetDomain, Issuer, ApplicationId, ReportId
| join kind=leftouter (
    AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where ErrorCode == 0
    | summarize SignInCount = count(),
                Countries = make_set(Country, 5),
                FirstSignIn = min(Timestamp)
      by AccountObjectId
  ) on AccountObjectId
| extend NewActor = iff(SignInCount < 10 or FirstSignIn > ago(7d), true, false)
| where IsAnonymousProxy == true or NewActor == true or array_length(Countries) > 1 or isnotempty(Issuer)
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Scattered Spider rogue federation backdoor (T1484.002)
let _known_admins = dynamic([]); // identity-team UPNs / break-glass
let FedOps = AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
    | where OperationName has_any (
        "Set federation settings on domain",
        "Set domain authentication",
        "Add verified domain",
        "Add unverified domain",
        "Add partner to company"
      )
    | where Result == "success"
    | extend Actor       = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
    | extend ActorIp     = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.ipAddress)
    | extend TargetDomain = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
    | mv-apply mp = parse_json(tostring(TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties)) on (
        summarize ModifiedProps = make_bag(pack(tostring(mp.displayName), tostring(mp.newValue)))
      )
    | project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Actor, ActorIp, TargetDomain, ModifiedProps, CorrelationId;
FedOps
| where Actor !in~ (_known_admins)
| join kind=leftouter (
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | summarize SignInCount = count(),
                FirstSignIn = min(TimeGenerated),
                Countries   = make_set(tostring(parse_json(tostring(LocationDetails)).countryOrRegion), 5)
      by UserPrincipalName
    | project Actor = UserPrincipalName, SignInCount, FirstSignIn, Countries
  ) on Actor
| extend NewOrRareActor = iff(SignInCount < 10 or FirstSignIn > ago(14d), true, false)
| where NewOrRareActor == true or array_length(Countries) > 1
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Actor, ActorIp, TargetDomain, ModifiedProps,
          NewOrRareActor, SignInCount, Countries, CorrelationId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Entra ID Federated Domain Trust Modification (Scattered Spider / UNC3944)
id: 7c1a4e06-9b2f-4c5d-9d8b-2d3e4f5a6b7c
status: experimental
description: Detects creation or modification of a federated identity provider / verified domain in Entra ID, a Scattered Spider (Octo Tempest) signature post-Global-Admin technique used to mint SAML tokens for any user.
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2023/10/25/octo-tempest-crosses-boundaries-to-facilitate-extortion-encryption-and-destruction/
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-320a
author: detection-eng
date: 2026/05/05
tags:
  - attack.t1484.002
  - attack.t1556
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - threat.scattered_spider
logsource:
  product: m365
  service: audit
detection:
  selection:
    OperationName|contains:
      - 'Set federation settings on domain'
      - 'Set domain authentication'
      - 'Add verified domain'
      - 'Add unverified domain'
      - 'Add partner to company'
    Result: 'success'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Planned tenant migrations / M&A activity
  - Identity-team configuration of legitimate IdPs (AD FS, Okta, Ping)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Scattered Spider's distinct post-takeover step is establishing a persistent backdoor at the IdP layer rather than dropping malware — Mandiant's UNC3944 reporting and Microsoft's Octo Tempest blog both call out federated-domain manipulation and AADInternals-style trust modification. Generic APT detections rarely look at AAD AuditLogs OperationName for federation primitives, and almost no one filter

ucs.title: [LLM] Scattered Spider mass-deploy of legitimate RMM agents (AnyDesk / ScreenConnect / Splashtop / Fleetdeck) on first-seen hosts
ucs.description: Hunts installation or first execution of the specific basket of commercial RMM tools Scattered Spider/UNC3944 uses for hands-on-keyboard persistence after credential theft. CISA AA23-320A and Mandiant publicly enumerated their preferred RMM tooling — they daisy-chain 2-3 different products on the same host so the loss of any single agent doesn't kick them out.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("AnyDesk.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","ScreenConnect.WindowsClient.exe","SplashtopStreamer.exe","Splashtop-streamer.exe","FleetDeck.Agent.exe","FleetDeckAgent.exe","Pulseway.exe","PCMonitorSrv.exe","TacticalRMM.exe","tacticalagent.exe","AteraAgent.exe","ITarianRemoteControl.exe","RustDesk.exe","TightVNC.exe","tvnserver.exe","Zaservice.exe","ZA_Connect.exe","DWAgent.exe","LMI_Rescue.exe","BomgarPac.exe","BeyondTrustHelper.exe","Domotz.exe","Level.exe","N-able.exe","NCentralRMM.exe","ManageEngineRMM.exe","DesktopCentralAgent.exe","RPort.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.process_name Processes.user
| `drop_dm_object_name("Processes")`
| eventstats dc(process_name) as rmm_tool_count by dest user
| eventstats dc(dest) as host_baseline_count by process_name earliest=-30d@d latest=-1d@d
| where rmm_tool_count >= 2 OR host_baseline_count <= 3
| eval scattered_spider_signal=case(rmm_tool_count>=2,"Multi-RMM stacking (UNC3944 TTP)",host_baseline_count<=3,"First-seen RMM in environment")
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
| table firstTime lastTime dest user process_name parent cmdline rmm_tool_count host_baseline_count scattered_spider_signal
ucs.kql:
// Scattered Spider / UNC3944 RMM toolkit (CISA AA23-320A, Microsoft Octo Tempest)
let RmmBins = dynamic([
    "anydesk.exe","screenconnect.clientservice.exe","screenconnect.windowsclient.exe",
    "splashtopstreamer.exe","splashtop-streamer.exe","fleetdeck.agent.exe","fleetdeckagent.exe",
    "pulseway.exe","pcmonitorsrv.exe","tacticalrmm.exe","tacticalagent.exe",
    "ateraagent.exe","itarianremotecontrol.exe","rustdesk.exe","tightvnc.exe",
    "tvnserver.exe","zaservice.exe","za_connect.exe","dwagent.exe","lmi_rescue.exe",
    "bomgarpac.exe","beyondtrusthelper.exe","domotz.exe","level.exe","n-able.exe",
    "ncentralrmm.exe","manageenginermm.exe","desktopcentralagent.exe","rport.exe"
]);
let BaselineDays = 30d;
let RecentHours  = 24h;
let RmmBaseline = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp between (ago(BaselineDays) .. ago(RecentHours))
    | where FileName has_any (RmmBins)
    | summarize by DeviceName, FileName;
let Recent = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(RecentHours)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName has_any (RmmBins)
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountUpn, FileName,
              ProcessCommandLine, FolderPath, SHA256,
              ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
              ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessTokenElevation;
// Signal A — RMM that has never run on THIS host before in 30 days
let FirstSeenOnHost = Recent
    | join kind=leftanti RmmBaseline on DeviceName, FileName
    | extend Signal = "FirstSeenRmmOnHost";
// Signal B — multiple distinct RMM products on the same host within 24h (UNC3944 stacks them)
let MultiStack = Recent
    | summarize ToolSet = make_set(FileName), ToolCount = dcount(FileName),
                FirstHit = min(Timestamp), LastHit = max(Timestamp),
                Cmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 10),
                Users = make_set(AccountUpn, 5)
      by DeviceName
    | where ToolCount >= 2
    | extend Signal = "MultipleRmmStacked";
union isfuzzy=true FirstSeenOnHost, MultiStack
| order by Timestamp desc, FirstHit desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Scattered Spider RMM-stack detection — Sentinel side (SecurityEvent + DeviceInfo)
let RmmBins = dynamic([
    "anydesk.exe","screenconnect.clientservice.exe","screenconnect.windowsclient.exe",
    "splashtopstreamer.exe","splashtop-streamer.exe","fleetdeck.agent.exe","fleetdeckagent.exe",
    "pulseway.exe","pcmonitorsrv.exe","tacticalrmm.exe","tacticalagent.exe",
    "ateraagent.exe","itarianremotecontrol.exe","rustdesk.exe","tightvnc.exe",
    "tvnserver.exe","zaservice.exe","za_connect.exe","dwagent.exe","lmi_rescue.exe",
    "bomgarpac.exe","beyondtrusthelper.exe","domotz.exe","level.exe","n-able.exe",
    "ncentralrmm.exe","manageenginermm.exe","desktopcentralagent.exe","rport.exe"
]);
let BaselineDays = 30d;
let RecentHours  = 24h;
let Baseline = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(BaselineDays) .. ago(RecentHours))
    | where EventID == 4688
    | extend Bin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
    | where Bin in (RmmBins)
    | summarize by Computer, Bin;
let Recent = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(RecentHours)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend Bin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
    | where Bin in (RmmBins)
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, Bin, NewProcessName, CommandLine,
              ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType;
let FirstSeenOnHost = Recent
    | join kind=leftanti Baseline on $left.Computer == $right.Computer, $left.Bin == $right.Bin
    | extend Signal = "FirstSeenRmmOnHost";
let MultiStack = Recent
    | summarize ToolSet = make_set(Bin), ToolCount = dcount(Bin),
                FirstHit = min(TimeGenerated), LastHit = max(TimeGenerated),
                Cmds = make_set(CommandLine, 10),
                Users = make_set(Account, 5)
      by Computer
    | where ToolCount >= 2
    | extend Signal = "MultipleRmmStacked";
union isfuzzy=true FirstSeenOnHost, MultiStack
| order by coalesce(TimeGenerated, FirstHit) desc
ucs.rationale: The exact RMM basket — AnyDesk + ScreenConnect + Splashtop + FleetDeck + Pulseway + TacticalRMM + RustDesk + ITarian + ManageEngine + Atera + Domotz + Level — is straight out of the CISA #StopRansomware: Scattered Spider advisory (AA23-320A) and Mandiant's UNC3944 profile. Stacking ≥2 distinct vendors on a single host within 24 hours is a UNC3944-specific behaviour (their playbook is to plant back
